headline: Tesla stock: How much does an improved auto business matter?
summary: Investing.com -- Tesla’s stronger automotive performance should improve near-term earnings and help finance its artificial intelligence investments, but Morgan Stanley and Barclays said Robotaxi, Full Self-Driving and Optimus remain the main drivers of the stock’s valuation.

headline: Pokémon Cards Beat the S&P 500 by 2.5x, But the Math Is a Lie
summary: A viral clip claims collectibles crush the stock market using 20 years of returns, but a financial advisor spotted a flaw in the comparison so fundamental he called it a math crime. The numbers only hold up if you never ask where they came from.
